text: Nike Vaporfly shoes improve running economy by approximately 4.2% compared with traditional marathon racing shoes (Adidas Adizero Adios 3).
population: highly-trained male and female distance runners

text: Nike Vaporfly shoes improve running economy by approximately 2.6% compared with traditional track spikes (Nike Zoom Matumbo 3).
population: highly-trained male and female distance runners

text: When matched for weight against a heavier marathon shoe, Nike Vaporfly still improved running economy by 2.9%, indicating the benefit is not solely due to lighter mass.
population: highly-trained male and female distance runners

text: Individual responses to super shoes vary considerably, with running economy improvements ranging from +0.50% (slight worsening) to -5.34% (large improvement) versus track spikes.
population: highly-trained male and female distance runners

text: Carbon-plated super shoes should be considered a viable racing option for track distances, not only road races, as they outperform traditional track spikes in running economy.
population: highly-trained male and female distance runners

text: Correlations between changes in running economy from super shoes and changes in biomechanical variables were trivial or small, suggesting the mechanism is not easily explained by simple gait changes.
population: highly-trained male and female distance runners
